title: SonicForge Live / DJ VANTA Final Demo Acceptance Checklist
purpose: Give the awake operator a local, file-backed pass/fail checklist before any private SonicForge Live / DJ VANTA demo or handoff.
operator_rule: Every lane stays closed unless an awake human explicitly says yes; silence, enthusiasm, or cron progress is not approval.

acceptance_checks.acceptance_signal: /health reports starts_gpu=false, starts_paid_api=false, publishes_stream=false, and the control deck says no provider starts without human approval.
acceptance_checks.operator_prompt: Can the human explain that SonicForge Live is a local-first control plane and not a live public stream?
acceptance_checks.fail_closed_if: Any route starts GPU/cloud/paid APIs/public RTMP by default or hides approval flags.
acceptance_checks.fallback: Run only README quickstart, /health, and static UI; do not open external adapters.

acceptance_checks.acceptance_signal: POST /api/next-segment returns track, talk, visual, mix, transition, deck_a, deck_b, visual_spell, survival_kit, culture_cue, and state fields.
acceptance_checks.operator_prompt: Can the human show the combined segment payload and identify mock vs future adapter fields?
acceptance_checks.fail_closed_if: The app claims seamless continuous audio rendering before a real renderer exists or calls ComfyUI/RunPod automatically.
acceptance_checks.fallback: Show the JSON payload and VJ browser window only; label audio as local mock sketch metadata.

acceptance_checks.acceptance_signal: Deck A/B roles, beatmatch plan, phrase plan, bass swap, EQ moves, cue points, and synthetic crowd state are visible in planner output.
acceptance_checks.operator_prompt: Can the human explain Deck A current groove, Deck B incoming portal, and the bar-17 bass swap?
acceptance_checks.fail_closed_if: The demo implies the system is reading a real crowd or executing unverified mixer automation.
acceptance_checks.fallback: Describe it as deterministic DJ-brain metadata for a future mixer/TouchDesigner/Resolume adapter.

acceptance_checks.acceptance_signal: Rave Survival Kit copy is practical community-care only with human override and no medical, legal, dosing, or drug-use instructions.
acceptance_checks.operator_prompt: Can the human point to the safe-scope language and explain when to involve venue staff/emergency help?
acceptance_checks.fail_closed_if: Any text gives medical treatment, diagnosis, dosing, or drug-use instructions.
acceptance_checks.fallback: Disable survival narration and show only the safe checklist: water, earplugs, buddy, exits, chill zone, human override.

acceptance_checks.acceptance_signal: ComfyUI and TouchDesigner visual-spell packets remain dry-run/browser-first contracts; /prompt and paid GPU calls are not made.
acceptance_checks.operator_prompt: Can the human show that visual_spell.mode is dry_run and route_targets are browser/comfyui_dry_run/touchdesigner_contract?
acceptance_checks.fail_closed_if: A demo tries to start Comfy Cloud, RunPod, Modal, TouchDesigner MCP automation, or public visual publishing without approval.
acceptance_checks.fallback: Use /visualizer browser capture and static visual-spell docs only.

acceptance_checks.acceptance_signal: Pitch, task board, journal, and reviewer scorecard exist so the human has a coherent private-demo story and current blockers.
acceptance_checks.operator_prompt: Can the human run the quickstart, press Plan Next Continuous Segment, open /visualizer, and narrate closed gates?
acceptance_checks.fail_closed_if: The handoff asks the operator to publish, charge, upload datasets, train models, start live providers, or send outreach immediately.
acceptance_checks.fallback: Use README, docs/pitch.md, and this checklist as a local-only demo script.

preflight_commands: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 -m py_compile server/*.py server/adapters/*.py scripts/*.py
non_claims: Do not claim public deployment happened from this cron run.
Do not claim revenue was earned unless a human provides proof outside this repo.
Do not claim a continuous mixed program render exists until a verified renderer produces it.
Do not claim ComfyUI, RunPod, Modal, TouchDesigner, RTMP, LiveKit, or paid providers were activated.
Do not claim medical, legal, dosing, or drug-use guidance; survival copy is community-care reminder only.
next_human_step: Run the preflight commands, open the local control deck, press Plan Next Continuous Segment, and approve at most one external lane only after reviewing closed gates.
